creator: rea@FreeBSD.org
text:
Fri, Oct 14, 2011 at 11:50:32AM +0400, Eygene Ryabinkin wrote:
> The patch is at
>   http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/exim/update-4.76-to-4.77.diff
> 
> Here is the QA page:
>   http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/qa/mail/exim/4.77
> It will be updated if any new information regarding the port quality
> will be received.

I had updated both the patch and QA page:
 - the patch for XCLIENT was updated to match the latest sources;
 - I had added UPDATING entry.

Now Exim builds even with the XCLIENT knob turned on.
--
